data.body: S2 (ce4d) IMPLEMENTED via held-out TDD. Orchestrator pinned _backend.py interface + authored contract(happy)/characterization(held-out byte-for-byte)/identity-edge(held-out)/capability(held-out) tests. Implementer subagent (saw only happy contract + interface + stubs) wrote JiraBackend + JiraIdentityConvention pure delegation. Validation: RED-first confirmed (right reason, NotImplementedError); full held-out oracle 33/33 GREEN; teeth confirmed (2 mutations->RED, restore->green); lint+typecheck GREEN; reconciler subtree+module-size gate 1333 pass. Committed 97ffa0dfb, pushed Gerrit change 901 (stacked on 900). Awaiting gates.
